messages.index.aboutMe.para: Hewwo! I’m a wowf fwom Thaiwand, wiving faw fwom home. Da name, TangMo, witewawwy twanswates to “watewmewon”. I’d be happy to chat about stuff fwom tech, photogwaphy, to daiwy dose of fuwwy memes. Being “wewativewy” new to da fandom, it’s nice to meet evewyone.
messages.index.aboutChara.title: About da chawactew
messages.index.aboutChara.para: I just finished putting cowows on a tempwate wefewence sheet; hazn't made a pwopew one. But uu can take a wook at this one nuw! Othew images on this site awe owdew pwacehowdew doodwe that hazn't been updated.

messages.bookingApp.booking.intro: Want to pway with me? Pewhaps in pwivate? Wequest booking hewe!

messages.bookingApp.result.title: Eww…

messages.drama.t1: “Find dwamas fwom da past and da futuwe”
messages.drama.t2: With da powew of Deep Weawning and Big Data
messages.drama.t3: How’d uu knuw if uuw cwosest fwiend wiww stiw up some dwama tomowwow?
messages.drama.p1: ThaiAnthwo pwoudwy pwesents! ThaiAnthwo Dwama! With da powew of Big Data and ouw database consisting of ovew 10 yeaws of cowwected infowmation, we awe wevewaging Deep Weawning to categowize and extwapowate da data!
messages.drama.p2: Thowndike Connectionism Theowy states weawning consists of a bond between a stimuwus and da wesponses. By twiaw and ewwow, we expewiment and untiw we find da most desiwabwe wesponses. Thowndike awso bewieved that anawysis might tuwn situations into compounds of featuwes, such as da numbew of sides on a shape, to hewp da mind gwasp and wetain da situation, and incwease theiw identifiabiwity.
messages.drama.p3: Ouw team utiwizes this concept to devewop this system by cweating connections and infew fwom past events and behaviouws with da accuwacy of up to 85%
messages.drama.p4: Just entew da two pawty’s names (Fuwsona names), and we wiww estimate da wisk of causing dwama! We can awso pwedict othew events too! You can gauge fwiendship compatibiwity hewe, fow exampwe. (Evawuating wewationship possibiwity is wesouwce-intensive. Thewe may be additionaw cost pew CPU houws.)
messages.drama.p5: Ouw initiaw testings found that ouw pwedictions can weduce Facebook witch-hunting and chat wog weaking by up to 99%! We hope that ouw pwoduct can bwing peace to da community!
messages.drama.p6_link: uu can checkout da white papew hewe
messages.drama.result.r0: Howd on! We awe seawching fow da possibiwity of nu dwama occuwwing…
messages.drama.result.r1: Awmost thewe! A dwama-fwee community, we wiww find it soon…
messages.drama.result.r2: 哦哇塞! Wooks wike we found something “intewesting”. Give us a moment…
messages.drama.result.r3: mmm, that name… That gets a wot of attention fwom ouw Awtificiaw Intewwigence…
messages.drama.result.r4: We awe using Naive Bay to cwassify uuw input association, uu can't evawuate it with uuw naked eye…
